title: Greater Armour
description: Adds lots of new useful Armour
body:
# Greater Armour

This mod serves as a midle ground betwen mid, early, and late game 

## **This mod adds:**
- Stone Armor
- Chain Armor
- Condium Armor

### More coming soon!!

## **Installation:**
To install this mod make sure you have [Forge installed](https://files.minecraftforge.net/net/minecraftforge/forge/)
Then download the latest stabe version of this mod for your version of minecraft and that your forge version is inline with your minecraft version then run the forge installer and drag this mod in to your mods folder. For a more detailed guide to install forge click [Here](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=BbaDOjHMjZ4)
.
